_source: Hand-authored (NOT generated by generate.mjs). Canonical case-set for the sync-server-URL validation rule, shared by the three shells' copies: TS validateSyncServerUrl (src/features/sync/syncServiceE2ee.ts), Swift validateServerURL (apps/ios/Sources/SyncManager.swift), Kotlin validateServerUrl (apps/android/.../SyncManager.kt). There is no Rust implementation, so this fixture is deliberately NOT wired into conformance.rs / generate.mjs (that harness locks TS<->Rust note rules). Each shell's unit test asserts its copy against these cases so the copies cannot silently drift.
description: Sync server URL validation. `expected` is the actionable error message, or null when the URL is accepted. The rule: trim, then require an http:// or https:// scheme (case-insensitive).

cases.expected: Add http:// or https:// to the start of the server URL.
Add http:// or https:// to the start of the server URL.
Add http:// or https:// to the start of the server URL.
